explanation: The property states that globally, whenever there is any change in Ventilatorv0.2 settings (bool_exp1), then a log of these settings changes is provided (bool_exp3). This directly translates the requirement that any change of settings must be logged.

The property states that globally (G), if there is any change in the Ventilatorv0.2 settings (ventilatorSettingsChanged), then a log of these changes must be provided (logVentilatorSettings). This directly captures the requirement for the system to log all changes to ventilator settings, including the value applied, as described by the atomic proposition 'logVentilatorSettings'.

The property states that globally, if the Ventilatorv0.2 settings are changed (ventilatorSettingsChanged), then it is always followed by logging these settings (logVentilatorSettings). This captures the requirement for the system to provide a log for any change in settings.

The property states that globally (G), if 'ventilatorSettingsChanged' (any change of Ventilatorv0.2 settings) occurs (bool_exp1), then 'logVentilatorSettings' (log change of Ventilatorv0.2 settings) must also occur (bool_exp3). This captures the requirement that a log must be provided whenever settings change.

The property states that globally, if any change of Ventilatorv0.2 settings occurs (ventilatorSettingsChanged), then a log of these settings must be provided (logVentilatorSettings) in the same state. This directly captures the requirement that the system shall provide a log for any change in ventilator settings.

The property states that globally, whenever 'ventilatorSettingsChanged' (any change of Ventilatorv0.2 settings) occurs, then 'logVentilatorSettings' (log change of Ventilatorv0.2 settings) must also occur. This directly translates the requirement that the system shall provide a log for any change in ventilator settings.

The property states that globally, whenever there is any change of Ventilatorv0.2 settings (represented by 'ventilatorSettingsChanged'), the system must provide a log of these settings (represented by 'logVentilatorSettings'). This ensures that every setting change is documented as required.

The property states that globally, if the ventilator settings change (ventilatorSettingsChanged), then a log of these settings is provided (logVentilatorSettings). This captures the requirement for the system to log any changes to ventilator settings.

The property ensures that whenever there is 'any change of Ventilatorv0.2 settings' (represented by 'ventilatorSettingsChanged'), a log of these settings (represented by 'logVentilatorSettings') is provided shortly thereafter. The phrase 'any change' implies an event, so the template considers both the rising edge of the 'ventilatorSettingsChanged' signal and the initial state where it might already be true. The 'including the value applied' part specifies the content of the log, which is implicitly covered by the 'logVentilatorSettings' atomic proposition and is not expressible through LTL operators.

The property states that globally, whenever the ventilator settings change (ventilatorSettingsChanged), a log of these settings is always provided (logVentilatorSettings). This captures the requirement that any change to ventilator settings must be recorded.
